prompt: Generate a seamless PBR material for a classic military RTS building exterior: worn green-gray painted steel panels, chipped edges, subtle rivets, grime in panel seams, sun-faded paint, small rust scratches, top-down readable, game-ready, tileable, realistic but stylized. No logos, no letters, no UI, no text, no faction symbols, no copyrighted IP, no recognizable Command and Conquer or Red Alert insignia, no vehicles, no characters, no full building image, no flat card, no unreadable noisy collage.
